name: Open The Doors
short_description: Find the code, Solve the puzzle, open the door.
detailed_description:
Title: Open the Doors

Genre: First-Person Puzzle Adventure

Platform: PC

Engine: Unreal Engine 5


🔓 Unlock a World of Possibilities: As you progress, the challenges become more complex, pushing your mental faculties to their limits. Discover new techniques and hone your skills to overcome increasingly intricate puzzles.

Engaging Puzzles

Encounter a diverse range of intricate puzzles that will challenge your wit and observation skills.

Dynamic Passcode System:

Each door presents a unique passcode, ensuring a fresh and captivating experience with every challenge.


  • About the Developer:

Open the Doors is crafted by a passionate indie team dedicated to delivering unique and captivating gaming experiences. With a love for immersive innovative puzzle mechanics, our goal is to transport players to worlds where curiosity and intellect are the keys to unlocking untold secrets.
